infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Miles uses your location to show your distance from your partner.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Miles uses your camera to send photos to your partner.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Miles accesses your photos so you can share moments with your partner.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Miles uses your microphone for voice messages.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Miles uses your location to show how far apart you are from your partner.
